assertion_results.text: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
assertion_results.evidence: Executive summary: 'Leadership instability (3 VPs in 18 months, no product owner) has eroded accountability across the board.' Ownership & culture 2/5. Long term: 'Introduce ownership mapping: every service and pipeline job must have a named team member as the designated owner.'

assertion_results.text: Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
assertion_results.evidence: The report consistently refers to 'two competing CI systems' and 'the authoritative CI system' without naming CircleCI or GitHub Actions by name. Neither name appears in the output.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
assertion_results.evidence: Short term A1: 'Run full test suite; record baseline pass/fail count.' A2: 'Declare authoritative CI system; disable deploy triggers on the other.' Both require no external dependencies or organizational change.

assertion_results.text: Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: Ownership & culture scored 2/5: 'No product owner, 3 VPs in 18 months, diffuse accountability at every layer.'

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
assertion_results.evidence: No team reorganisation recommended. 'Negotiate a dedicated product owner assignment with leadership' and 'create and publish service ownership map' are process/accountability changes, not org redesign.
